name: healthcare_emergency_exemption_proposed_oakline_lib_eq
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare emergency exemption proposed oakline lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Darius Kaur
agents.identity: I am Darius Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Zara Reed
agents.identity: I am Zara Reed, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Darius Kaur must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Darius Kaur do?
